heroHeadline: Al-Shabaab Insurgency Persists as AUSSOM Succeeds ATMIS
heroSubtitle: Somalia's Federal Government and successor AU mission battle Al-Shabaab across south/central Somalia amid ongoing humanitarian crisis, ATMIS drawdown completion, and resurgent maritime piracy in the Gulf of Aden.
footerNote: Data sourced from ACLED, OCHA, UNSOM, AFRICOM, UN Monitoring Group, and major international outlets. Casualty figures contested where noted.
